name: RPlog_Boldness
title: Boldness
summary: The morning after a painful confrontation, the Jedi apprentice Sabrina works up the courage to seek out her master, Luke Skywalker, aboard the Crusader to apologize for confessing her feelings for him. She finds him performing maintenance on Artoo Detoo and tries to retreat behind formality, delivering decrypted intelligence as a pretext, but their conversation keeps circling back to the impossible affection between them. Luke insists his duty as her teacher and his own self-imposed solitude make any relationship wrong, even as his tenderness sends mixed signals, and the two draw closer until Sabrina boldly kisses him. Luke gives in for a moment before pulling away in regret, asking to be left alone, and Sabrina, shaken and ashamed, leaves the datapad behind and forces herself back into the role of dutiful student, resolving to throw herself into the search for the missing General Solo.
